title: HTML Cleaner Input
description: Extract clean text from HTML by removing JavaScript, CSS, and tracking tags. Perfect for web scraping pipelines, RAG systems, and AI agent workflows.

sample.raw_payload:
Hello World

This is a test page with JavaScript and CSS that should be removed.

exampleInputs.raw_payload:
Just shipped a major update to our AI agent framework! 🚀
Processing time down from 112ms to 0.8ms. That's 140x faster.
@elonmusk you should see this. #AI #Performance #Rust

Rust achieves 1ms HTML processing, Python still at 100ms

submitted by u/rustacean to r/programming
@python_dev
42 points

This is impressive! We've been struggling with BeautifulSoup performance. Can someone share benchmarks? #python #rust

urls.title: URLs to Process
urls.description: Array of URLs to fetch and process (alternative to raw_payload)

includeMetadata.title: Include Metadata
includeMetadata.description: Extract and return metadata (language, processing time, script removal stats)

removeScripts.title: Remove Scripts
removeScripts.description: Strip JavaScript and tracking scripts from HTML

removeStyles.title: Remove Styles
removeStyles.description: Strip CSS and style tags from HTML

extractMentions.title: Extract Mentions
extractMentions.description: Extract @mentions from text (for social media content)

extractHashtags.title: Extract Hashtags
extractHashtags.description: Extract #hashtags from text (for social media content)
